title: This AI company wants to replace MRIs with a 60-second dip in the spa. Can that really work?
summary: Midjourney is entering the healthcare sector with a new body-scanning product designed to replace traditional MRIs in just 60 seconds, positioning it as a spa-like experience. If successful, the technology could significantly expand access to medical imaging for underserved populations.
content: Midjourney is making a foray into healthcare with its latest body-scanner product, aiming to make medical imaging more accessible.

zh.title: 这家AI公司想用60秒的温泉浸泡来取代核磁共振成像。这真的可行吗？
zh.summary: Midjourney正进入医疗保健领域，推出一款新的身体扫描产品，设计用来在短短60秒内取代传统核磁共振，打造成水疗般的体验。如果成功，该技术可能会大幅扩大医学影像对服务不足人群的可及性。

title: The artificial ice pyramids saving India's mountain villages
summary: Himalayan mountain villages are constructing artificial glaciers—pyramid-shaped structures designed to preserve ice—to ensure reliable water supplies for spring crop irrigation. This innovative adaptation strategy addresses water scarcity challenges driven by climate change and melting natural glaciers.
content: Himalayan villages are creating artificial glaciers to guarantee water for their crops in the spring.

zh.title: 拯救印度山区村庄的人工冰金字塔
zh.summary: 喜马拉雅山区村庄正在建造人工冰川——设计用来保存冰的金字塔形结构——以确保春季作物灌溉用水供应可靠。这一创新的适应战略应对了由气候变化和天然冰川融化导致的缺水挑战。

title: 'He hid the a la carte menu': Who should pay on the first date
summary: Dating etiquette around bill-splitting remains contested, with perspectives ranging from 50-50 splits to the traditional expectation that the person who initiated the date should pay. The debate reflects broader generational shifts in gender roles and relationship norms.
content: Some insist on splitting the bill, others say the asker should pay, while many still see a man paying as romantic.

zh.title: "他隐藏了单点菜单"：第一次约会谁应该买单
zh.summary: 关于分摊账单的约会礼仪仍存争议，观点从五五分摊到传统期望（发起约会的人应该买单）不一而足。这场辩论反映了性别角色和关系规范的更广泛的代际转变。

title: Five ways the Iran peace deal could affect you and your money
summary: The Iran peace deal is already rippling through financial markets, with fuel and gas prices declining in recent days following the agreement. The analysis examines five ways the end of hostilities could impact individual household finances and broader economic conditions.
content: With fuel and gas prices having fallen in recent days, we look at how the end of hostitlities might affect you - in five charts.

zh.title: 伊朗和平协议可能影响你和你财务的五种方式
zh.summary: 伊朗和平协议已经波及金融市场，协议签署后的这些天里燃油和天然气价格随之下跌。分析研究了敌对状态的结束可能以五种方式影响个人家庭财务和更广泛的经济状况。

title: Brexit cost 6% of UK economy, Bank of England company data suggests
summary: Bank of England analysis indicates that Britain's departure from the European Union has cost the UK economy approximately 6% of potential GDP growth. The research quantifies the economic sacrifice incurred through the decision to exit the EU.
content: Analysis showed how much the UK could have grown if it had not exited the EU.

zh.title: 英国央行数据显示脱欧使英国经济损失6%
zh.summary: 英国央行分析表明，英国脱离欧盟的决定使英国经济失去了大约6%的潜在GDP增长。该研究量化了因做出脱欧决定而产生的经济损失。

title: SpaceX is vastly more expensive than any stock in the S&P 500, fueled by ‘FOMO’ mentality
summary: SpaceX is now valued higher than any individual S&P 500 company, driven by retail investor "fear of missing out" flowing billions into SpaceX ETFs despite unconventional valuations. This speculative demand reflects retail enthusiasm for the space exploration company that transcends traditional financial metrics.
content: Billions of dollars have flowed into SpaceX ETFs as retail investors look past conventional valuations.

zh.title: SpaceX估值远超标普500中的任何股票，受"害怕错过"心理驱动
zh.summary: 在散户投资者"害怕错过"心理的驱动下，数十亿美元流入SpaceX ETF，使其估值现已超过标普500中的任何单一公司，尽管其估值并非常规。这种投机性需求反映了零售投资者对这家太空探索公司的热情，远超传统财务指标。

title: Intel’s stock jumps 11% — even as analysts say new Apple chip deal might start small
summary: Intel's stock rose 11% following news of a new chip-supply deal with Apple, though analysts cautioned the agreement may begin modestly in scale. The rally reflects confidence that Intel is converting political support and strategic advantages into concrete foundry business wins.
content: Intel “is steadily expanding its domestic capacity and converting political and strategic tailwinds into concrete foundry wins,” an analyst says.

zh.title: 英特尔股价跳涨11% — 尽管分析师表示苹果芯片交易可能规模较小
zh.summary: 英特尔股价在与苹果的新芯片供应交易消息传出后上涨了11%，尽管分析师警告该协议可能规模较小。这波上涨反映了投资者对英特尔将政治支持和战略优势转化为实际代工业务的信心。

title: Two big reasons Accenture’s stock is sliding in the wake of earnings
summary: Accenture's stock declined following earnings results where the consulting firm's guidance fell short of market expectations. Analysts expressed concerns that recently announced client deals could present complex integration challenges that weigh on profitability.
content: The consulting company’s outlook came up short of expectations, and at least one analyst wonders if newly announced deals will bring complex integration challenges.

zh.title: Accenture股价下滑的两大原因
zh.summary: Accenture在公布财报后股价下跌，该咨询公司的指引低于市场预期。分析师表示担忧最近宣布的客户协议可能面临复杂的整合挑战，这将对盈利能力造成压力。

title: Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into 'freeway construction zones'
summary: Waymo initiated a recall of approximately 3,900 robotaxis after incidents where autonomous vehicles drove into closed freeway construction zones. The company is implementing software updates to fix the underlying navigation issues.
content: After some Waymo robotaxis drove into closed construction zones, the company implemented a recall to fix underlying software issues.

zh.title: Waymo召回约3900辆自动驾驶出租车，部分驾驶进入"高速公路施工区"
zh.summary: Waymo启动了约3900辆自动驾驶出租车的召回，因为这些自动驾驶车辆驾驶进入了已关闭的高速公路施工区域。该公司正在实施软件更新以修复潜在的导航问题。

title: Trump administration temporarily cuts student loan interest rates for borrowers on autopay
summary: The Trump administration announced a temporary interest rate reduction for federal student loan borrowers who enroll in automatic payments, offering a larger discount than previously available. The policy aims to encourage automatic payment adoption while reducing borrowing costs for participating borrowers.
content: The Trump administration announced it will offer federal student loan borrowers who sign up for autopay a larger interest rate discount.

zh.title: 特朗普政府为自动还款的借款人暂时降低学生贷款利率
zh.summary: 特朗普政府宣布对注册自动还款的联邦学生贷款借款人实施临时利率下调，提供比以前更大的折扣。该政策旨在鼓励自动还款的采纳，同时降低参与借款人的借贷成本。

title: SpaceX options volume explodes as trading kicks off. Here is a low-risk strategy to play the massive surge.
summary: Trading volume in SpaceX options has surged as the public equity market opens up new derivative opportunities for the company. The article highlights a pro-level options strategy that minimizes upfront costs while managing downside risk for investors seeking exposure.
content: This pro-level move minimizes out-of-pocket costs and helps manage risk.

zh.title: SpaceX期权交易量激增。这是应对大幅增长的低风险策略。
zh.summary: 随着公开股票市场为公司打开新的衍生品机会，SpaceX期权的交易量激增。该文章强调了一种专业级期权策略，可最大限度地降低前期成本，同时管理寻求敞口的投资者的下行风险。

title: Micron, other memory stocks are having their best year ever. Why do they still look so cheap?
summary: Memory chip manufacturers like Micron have posted their strongest yearly performance as AI demand drives semiconductor prices higher, yet these stocks remain significantly undervalued on traditional metrics. The disconnect suggests market participants may be underappreciating the secular tailwinds supporting the memory sector.
content: Some of the AI boom’s biggest earners have become its biggest bargains.

zh.title: 美光和其他存储芯片股票创造历史最佳表现。为什么它们看起来仍然那么便宜？
zh.summary: 美光等存储芯片制造商在AI需求推动半导体价格上升时取得了最强的年度表现，但这些股票在传统指标上仍然明显被低估。这种差异表明市场参与者可能低估了支持存储部门的长期顺风。

title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
summary: Former President Barack Obama inaugurates his presidential center in Chicago with attendance from former presidents and prominent dignitaries, though President Trump was notably absent.
content: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.

zh.title: 照片：众星云集庆祝奥巴马总统中心揭幕
zh.summary: 前总统巴拉克·奥巴马在芝加哥为其总统中心揭幕，吸引了前任总统和政要出席，但特朗普总统显著缺席。

title: Next week's inflation data just got even more important. Here's what's ahead for the market
summary: Upcoming inflation data gains urgency as markets assess potential interest rate moves by central banks amid strong equity valuations and mixed economic signals.
content: Investors will now laser in on any signs that the central bank could hike interest rates against a backdrop of a buoyant stock market.

zh.title: 下周通胀数据变得更加重要，市场前景如下
zh.summary: 随着市场评估央行可能的利率调整，即将公布的通胀数据的重要性大幅提升，在股市估值强劲和经济信号混合的背景下。

title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
summary: SpaceX shares decline 7% in post-IPO trading, falling to levels near the volume-weighted average price and leaving early investors near breakeven amid market volatility.
content: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.

zh.title: SpaceX上市后平均买家在两天暴跌后几乎被套
zh.summary: SpaceX股票在上市后交易中下跌7%，跌至接近成交量加权平均价附近，在市场波动中让早期投资者接近保本点。

title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal
summary: Vice President JD Vance defended the Trump administration's Iran peace deal, asserting that the U.S. will only provide resources if Iran fully complies with the agreement's terms. The statement underscores the administration's conditional approach to the diplomatic accord.
content: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.

zh.title: 范斯说美国不会给伊朗"一分钱"，为特朗普伊朗和平协议辩护
zh.summary: 副总统J.D.范斯为特朗普政府的伊朗和平协议进行了辩护，声称美国只有在伊朗完全遵守协议条款时才会提供资源。该声明强调了政府在外交协议上的有条件做法。

title: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
summary: President Trump withdrew his nomination of Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence and is set to nominate Bill Pulte for the role instead. The change comes despite congressional efforts to block the appointment.
content: With President Donald Trump halting his nomination of  U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte is set to take on the role.

zh.title: 特朗普国家情报总监人选普尔特尽管面临国会阻止，仍有望获得美国情报接入权
zh.summary: 特朗普总统撤回了对杰伊·克莱顿出任国家情报总监的提名，并准备提名比尔·普尔特担任该职位。这一改变来自于国会阻止这项任命的努力。

title: U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas
summary: The U.S. Navy lifted its blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas at President Trump's direction, marking a significant shift in the administration's Iran policy. The move opens Iranian shipping routes that had been restricted by American military enforcement.
content: The Navy on Thursday lifted its blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas at the direction of President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 美国海军结束对伊朗港口和沿海地区的封锁
zh.summary: 美国海军在特朗普总统的指示下解除了对伊朗港口和沿海地区的封锁，标志着该政府伊朗政策的重大转变。此举打开了被美国军事实施封锁的伊朗航运路线。

title: How America cheated Black GIs after World War II, contributing to the racial wealth gap
summary: A historical analysis examines how Black servicemen were systematically denied equal veterans' benefits after World War II, establishing discriminatory patterns that persist in today's racial wealth gap. The lingering effects of this systemic exclusion continue to impact Black Americans and broader economic inequality.
content: Their descendants, and the rest of us, are still paying the price.

zh.title: 美国如何在二战后欺骗黑人士兵，加剧种族财富差距
zh.summary: 历史分析审视了黑人军人在二战后如何被系统性地拒绝获得平等的退伍军人福利，建立了持续存在于当今种族财富差距中的歧视模式。这一系统性排斥的持久影响继续冲击黑人美国人和更广泛的经济不平等。

title: Wall Street recovers from Fed slump, and the next step for Amazon's AI chip ambitions
summary: CNBC's Investing Club released its daily afternoon market update covering Wall Street's recovery from Fed-driven weakness and Amazon's advances in AI chip development. The briefing provides actionable trading insights for the final hour of the trading day.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 华尔街从美联储衰退中复苏，亚马逊AI芯片野心的下一步
zh.summary: CNBC投资俱乐部发布了其每日午后市场更新，涵盖华尔街从美联储驱动的疲软中的复苏和亚马逊在AI芯片开发中的进展。该简报为交易日最后一小时提供了可行的交易见解。

title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
summary: Traders on prediction market Kalshi are assigning greater than 50% probability to a Federal Reserve rate hike in 2026, following recent Fed signals about potential monetary tightening. The market pricing reflects growing expectations for higher interest rates.
content: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.

zh.title: Kalshi交易者看好美联储今年加息概率超过50%
zh.summary: 预测市场Kalshi上的交易者在最近美联储关于可能货币紧缩的信号之后，给2026年美联储加息分配了超过50%的概率。市场定价反映了对更高利率的日益增长的预期。

title: Trump’s Iran agreement is a massive buy signal for stocks
summary: An analysis argues that Trump's Iran agreement signals the end of potential conflict, creating a major buying opportunity for stock investors. The perspective views the diplomatic resolution as a significant positive catalyst for equity markets.
content: Hyperventilating experts were wrong about the Iran war. The end of the conflict is a massive buy signal for stocks.

zh.title: 特朗普的伊朗协议是股票的大规模买入信号
zh.summary: 一项分析论证特朗普的伊朗协议预示着潜在冲突的结束,为股票投资者创造了重大购买机会。这一观点将外交解决方案视为股票市场的重大正面催化剂。

title: These stocks are in trouble now that Kevin Warsh removed the market’s guardrails
summary: A market analysis contends that new Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh is departing from the Fed's traditional policy framework, potentially exposing investors to greater volatility and uncertainty. The commentary warns that certain stocks may face particular risks under his more unconventional approach.
content: The new Fed chief is ditching the central bank’s playbook — leaving your portfolio flying blind.

zh.title: 凯文·沃尔什移除了市场的护栏,这些股票现在陷入困境
zh.summary: 市场分析认为,新美联储主席凯文·沃尔什正在偏离美联储的传统政策框架,可能使投资者面临更大的波动性和不确定性。评论警告称,在他更非常规的方法下,某些股票可能面临特殊风险。

title: SpaceX shares to more than double to above $400, research firm predicts
summary: A research firm projects that SpaceX shares could surge to above $400, more than doubling their current value and potentially making it the world's largest company by market capitalization. The prediction reflects growing confidence in the company's space business prospects.
content: The stock move could make SpaceX the largest company in the world.

zh.title: 研究公司预测SpaceX股票将上涨一倍多至400美元以上
zh.summary: 一家研究公司预测SpaceX股票可能飙升至400美元以上,使其市值翻一番多,并可能成为世界上市值最大的公司。这一预测反映了对该公司太空业务前景日益增长的信心。

title: Why this year's World Cup is happening at the perfect time for struggling Nike
summary: This year's World Cup timing offers a strategic opportunity for Nike to leverage sports sponsorships and global marketing to revitalize its struggling business. The event could provide the catalyst needed to boost the athletic apparel company's sales and brand momentum.
content: The World Cup might be the boost Nike needs to jumpstart its business.

zh.title: 为什么今年世界杯恰逢耐克困难时期是完美时机
zh.summary: 今年世界杯的时机为耐克提供了战略机会，可以利用体育赞助和全球营销来振兴其困难的业务。这一赛事可能成为提升这家运动服装公司销售和品牌势头所需的催化剂。

title: How ‘Toy Story 5’ could help power a major comeback year for Hollywood
summary: Hollywood is experiencing strong momentum with box office receipts up 15% year-over-year, and studios are banking on Pixar's 'Toy Story 5' to deliver an even larger boost. The blockbuster franchise launch could solidify what's shaping up to be a major recovery year for the industry.
content: A string of surprise hits has this year’s box office already up 15% from last year, but studios and theater owners are looking to Pixar’s signature franchise to deliver a big boost.

zh.title: 《玩具总动员5》如何助力好莱坞实现重大回归年
zh.summary: 好莱坞势头强劲，票房收入同比增长15%，制片厂寄希望于皮克斯的《玩具总动员5》实现更大幅度的提升。这部大片的推出可能会巩固该行业正在形成的重大复苏年。

title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh's strong rhetoric on inflation control reverberated through financial markets, signaling expectations for a more hawkish monetary policy than previously anticipated. The comments suggest investors should prepare for more aggressive Fed decisions on interest rates.
content: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.

zh.title: 市场为比预期更鹰派的沃什美联储做准备

title: I’m 55 and retiring in 6 years. Should I be switching to Roth 401(k) contributions now?
summary: A retirement advice column addresses whether someone planning to retire in six years should shift to Roth 401(k) contributions, highlighting that many workers remain hesitant about such plans despite their tax-advantaged benefits. The analysis examines optimal timing for Roth conversions near retirement.
content: People are still holding back on participating in Roth plans at work, Vanguard says.

title: Before you pay for debt settlement, ask these 7 questions to find the right company
summary: A consumer guidance article provides seven key questions for vetting debt settlement companies before hiring them, emphasizing that not all firms in the industry operate with integrity. The guidance helps consumers identify trustworthy partners when managing debt problems.

zh.summary: 一篇消费者指南文章提供了七个关键问题，用于在雇用债务解决公司前进行审查，强调并非行业内所有公司都诚实经营。该指南帮助消费者在处理债务问题时识别可信赖的合作伙伴。

title: SpaceX stock sinks 7%, continuing to cool after three-day rally
summary: SpaceX stock declined 7% after a three-day rally, signaling that investor enthusiasm for the company may be cooling. The pullback reflects typical market volatility following periods of strong gains and potential uncertainty about valuations.

title: Trump hits back at critics as Iran peace deal fuels debate over U.S. concessions
summary: The U.S.-Iran peace deal framework commits both sides to further negotiations over 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction. The agreement faces criticism over potential U.S. concessions to secure the deal. The framework aims to extend the current cease-fire and address regional tensions.
content: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.

zh.title: 特朗普回击批评者，伊朗和平协议引发美国让步的辩论

title: Obama Center launch brings Democratic political glitterati to Chicago ahead of crucial elections
summary: Democratic leaders, White House alumni, and major donors are gathering in Chicago to commemorate the opening of the Obama Presidential Center. The event marks a significant political moment ahead of crucial elections. It brings together key figures in the Democratic party during a pivotal period.
content: Political elites, White House alums, donors and business leaders will converge on Chicago on Thursday to commemorate the launch of the Obama Presidential Center.

zh.title: 奥巴马中心开幕为芝加哥带来民主党政界精英，关键选举前夕
zh.summary: 民主党领导人、白宫校友和主要捐献者聚集在芝加哥纪念奥巴马总统中心的开幕。该事件标志着关键选举前的重大政治时刻。它在关键时期汇聚了民主党的主要人物。

title: Intel surges 9% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
summary: Intel's stock surged 9% following President Trump's announcement of a partnership between Intel and Apple on U.S. chip design. The stock jump reflects investor optimism about the chipmaker's recovery from years of manufacturing challenges. The partnership signals a renewed focus on domestic semiconductor production.
content: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.

zh.title: 特朗普表示英特尔将与苹果合作进行美国芯片设计后，英特尔股票上涨9%
zh.summary: 在特朗普总统宣布英特尔与苹果的美国芯片设计合作伙伴关系后，英特尔股票上涨9%。股票上涨反映了投资者对该芯片制造商从多年制造困难中恢复的乐观态度。该合作伙伴关系标志着对国内半导体生产的重新关注。

title: California’s counting on an IPO tax windfall. Several factors are complicating the equation
summary: California anticipates significant tax revenue from upcoming IPOs by SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. However, experts caution that various factors could substantially reduce the actual revenue impact on state coffers. The potential windfall underscores California's dependence on major tech company exits.
content: The IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic could create a tax windfall for the state of California. But experts say the revenue impact may be blunted.

zh.title: 加州期待IPO税收意外收益 多个因素使局面复杂化
zh.summary: 加州预期从SpaceX、OpenAI和Anthropic的首次公开募股中获得巨大税收收益。然而，专家警告称多种因素可能大幅减少实际对州金库的收益。这笔潜在意外收益凸显了加州对主要科技公司退出的依赖。

title: Gas prices fall below $4 per gallon as oil supply fears ease after Iran deal
summary: Gas prices have fallen below $4 per gallon as oil supply concerns eased following the Iran peace deal framework. Prices remain roughly 30% higher than pre-conflict levels from before the February 28 U.S.-Israel military action. The decline reflects market relief from reduced geopolitical risk.
content: Gas prices are still 30% higher compared to what drivers paid before the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28.

zh.title: 伊朗协议缓解油供担忧 汽油价格跌至每加仑4美元以下
zh.summary: 伊朗和平协议框架达成后，石油供应担忧缓解，汽油价格已跌至每加仑4美元以下。价格仍比2月28日美以军事行动前的水平高出约30%。这一下跌反映了市场对地缘政治风险降低的欢迎。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer highlights major market drivers including Apple's price increases and Intel's surge from Trump's semiconductor announcement. The column identifies critical factors shaping stock market movement for the trading day. These insights help investors understand key market dynamics and potential trading opportunities.
content: Apple plans price hikes, and Intel is surging on comments from President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默：周四股市十大看点
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克莱默强调了主要市场驱动因素，包括苹果价格上涨和英特尔因特朗普半导体公告而飙升。这一专栏指出了塑造当日股市运动的关键因素，这些见解帮助投资者了解关键的市场动态和潜在的交易机会。

title: The next two weeks could be a bumpy ride for U.S. stocks. Buy any dip, this strategist says.
summary: Citadel Securities strategist Scott Rubner identifies the next two weeks as potentially one of the year's most volatile periods for U.S. stocks. He recommends viewing any price dips as buying opportunities despite anticipated turbulence. The outlook suggests near-term headwinds but long-term value creation potential.
content: Citadel Securities strategist Scott Rubner says one of the most important two weeks of the year is here, and that could open buying opportunities for stocks.

zh.title: 未来两周美国股市可能出现波动。这位策略师建议逢低买入。
zh.summary: 花旗证券策略师斯科特·鲁布纳认为接下来两周可能是今年美国股市波动最剧烈的时期之一。他建议将任何价格下跌视为买入机会，尽管预计会出现波动。前景显示短期面临逆风，但长期存在价值创造的潜力。

title: ‘I’ll probably be working until I die’: I’m 60, work as a restaurant server and have $2,000 in an IRA. Who can help me?
summary: A 60-year-old restaurant server with minimal retirement savings of $2,000 and $4,400 in credit-card debt faces working indefinitely. The situation exemplifies financial vulnerability among service industry workers approaching retirement. Expert guidance on debt management and emergency savings is critical for this demographic.
content: “Last year, I had to buy a used car because my previous one died. I also have $4,400 in credit-card debt.”

zh.title: "我可能会一直工作到死"：我60岁，在餐厅当服务员，只有2000美元的退休账户。谁能帮助我？
zh.summary: 一位60岁的餐厅服务员，退休储蓄仅2000美元，还欠信用卡债4400美元，面临着终身工作的困境。这种情况反映了接近退休年龄的服务业工人所面临的财务脆弱性。对于这一人口群体来说，关于债务管理和应急储蓄的专家指导至关重要。

title: Here are 5 wild stats from SpaceX's first week on the Nasdaq
summary: SpaceX achieved notable trading records during its first week as a publicly traded Nasdaq company, including strong trading volume and acquisition activity. The strong market debut reflects significant investor enthusiasm for the aerospace manufacturer. The performance highlights market confidence in the company's growth prospects.
content: SpaceX's first few days of trading have been filled with superlatives, from trading volume to the size of the company's first acquisition.

zh.title: SpaceX在纳斯达克首周交易的5个令人惊讶的数据
zh.summary: SpaceX在成为纳斯达克上市公司的首周创造了显著的交易记录，包括强劲的交易量和并购活动。强势的市场首秀反映了投资者对这家航空航天制造商的巨大热情。该表现凸显了市场对公司增长前景的信心。

title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: SpaceX, Apple, Marvell, CME, Palantir, Nike, Amazon, Micron & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major recommendations on diverse companies including SpaceX, Apple, Marvell, CME, Palantir, Nike, Amazon, and Micron on Thursday. These analyst calls significantly influence investor sentiment and trading decisions across multiple sectors. The broad coverage reflects substantial market activity and changing investment views.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Thursday.

zh.title: 周四重磅分析师评级：SpaceX、苹果、美光、CME、Palantir、耐克、亚马逊等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师在周四对包括SpaceX、苹果、美光、CME、Palantir、耐克、亚马逊等多家公司发布了重要评级建议。这些分析师评级能显著影响投资者的情绪和跨多个行业的交易决策。广泛的报道反映了实质性的市场活动和投资观点的变化。

title: Micron’s stock is on the rise. Even Apple isn’t safe from ballooning memory-chip costs.
summary: Micron Technology's rising stock reflects robust demand for memory chips that continues to exceed supply despite manufacturing expansion efforts. Even major tech companies like Apple face rising costs from the memory chip shortage. The supply-demand imbalance creates widespread pricing pressure across the semiconductor and technology industries.
content: Demand for memory chips will continue to outpace supply in the near term despite efforts to add manufacturing capacity, an analyst says.

zh.title: 美光股价上升，苹果也无法幸免于内存芯片成本飙升
zh.summary: 美光科技股价上升反映了对内存芯片的强劲需求，尽管制造产能在扩大但需求仍然超过供应。甚至苹果等大型科技公司也面临内存芯片短缺导致的成本上升。供需失衡在半导体和科技行业造成了广泛的价格压力。

title: Women have better retirement savings habits but lower 401(k) balances than men, Vanguard finds
summary: Vanguard research reveals that women save a higher percentage of their paychecks for retirement than men, yet maintain lower 401(k) balances. The gap results from wage disparities and other economic disadvantages facing women. The finding highlights structural challenges to retirement equity between genders.
content: While women tend to save more of their paycheck for retirement, they have lower 401(k) balances due to other factors, including wages that trail men's earnings.

zh.title: 先锋集团发现：女性有更好的退休储蓄习惯，但401(k)余额低于男性
zh.summary: 先锋集团的研究表明，女性将工资中更高的百分比用于退休储蓄，但401(k)余额仍低于男性。这一差距源于工资差异和女性面临的其他经济劣势。这一发现凸显了性别间退休公平性的结构性挑战。

title: KBW says buy the dip on CME Group shares, says perpetual futures fears are overblown
summary: Investment firm KBW upgraded CME Group to outperform, recommending investors buy any price weakness in the exchange operator's shares. KBW argues that market fears surrounding perpetual futures are exaggerated and overly reflected in current valuations. The call suggests attractive entry points on any dips.
content: The investment firm upgraded the exchange name to outperform from market perform.

zh.title: KBW建议逢低买入芝商所集团股票，称永续期货担忧被夸大了
zh.summary: 投资公司KBW将芝商所升级为跑赢大市，建议投资者在交易所运营商股票价格出现任何疲软时买入。KBW辩称，市场对永续期货的担忧被夸大了，并过度反映在当前估值中。该评级建议在任何下跌时有吸引力的入场点。

title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
summary: A homeowner spending $170,000 on accessibility renovations for aging and disabled parents seeks information on potential tax deductions. With at least half the remodeling cost dedicated to accommodating a disabled mother, significant tax benefits may apply. Understanding applicable deductions is crucial for maximizing tax recovery.
content: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible.”

zh.title: 我花17万美元升级我的房子以照顾年迈的父母。我能获得税收减免吗?
zh.summary: 一位房主花费17万美元进行无障碍改造以照顾年迈和残疾的父母，寻求有关潜在税收减免的信息。由于至少一半的改造成本用于照顾残疾母亲，可能适用重大税收优惠。了解适用的减免对最大化税收回收至关重要。

title: Two key things that need to happen before Strait of Hormuz traffic can return to prewar levels
summary: The U.S.-Iran cease-fire extension requires practical implementation steps to restore shipping traffic through the strategically critical Strait of Hormuz waterway. The narrow passage carries substantial global oil supplies, making its stability essential to energy markets and global commerce. Successful de-escalation depends on both sides fulfilling specific operational commitments.
content: The U.S. and Iran agreed to a framework for a peace deal that extends their cease-fire for another 60 days. Now, a series of practical steps are needed for traffic to pick back up through the shipping chokepoint.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡交通恢复至战前水平之前需要发生的两件关键事情
zh.summary: 美伊停火延长需要采取实际实施步骤，以恢复通过战略上至关重要的霍尔木兹海峡水道的航运交通。这条狭窄的水道运输大量全球石油供应，其稳定性对能源市场和全球商业至关重要。成功降级取决于双方履行特定的操作承诺。

title: People starting new jobs at lowest level in five years
summary: Job creation has hit a five-year low as labor market indicators weaken. Vacancy rates continue declining according to the UK Office for National Statistics, suggesting broader employment market challenges ahead.
content: The Office for National Statistics says some areas of the jobs market are weakening, as vacancies continue to fall.

zh.title: 人们开始新工作的人数创五年最低水平
zh.summary: 随着劳动力市场指标恶化，新增就业创五年来最低。根据英国国家统计局数据，空缺职位数继续下降，预示着就业市场面临更广泛的挑战。

title: Apple to raise prices as AI boom pushes up chip costs
summary: Apple plans to increase product prices as semiconductor costs surge due to rising AI demand. The timing and specific products subject to increases remain uncertain following CEO Tim Cook's announcement.
content: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.

zh.title: 苹果因AI热潮推高芯片成本而提价
zh.summary: 由于AI需求增加导致半导体成本飙升，苹果计划提高产品价格。在首席执行官蒂姆·库克的宣布后，涨价的时间和具体产品仍不确定。

title: Stock futures rise as Fed hints at possible rate hike in 2026; Kospi hits over 9,000 for the first time: Live updates
summary: Despite early gains and strong intraday highs, major U.S. stock indices fell sharply as the Dow closed down over 500 points. The decline came amid Fed communications regarding potential 2026 rate adjustments and global market movements including South Korea's Kospi reaching historic levels.
content: After hitting a fresh intraday all-time high, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ultimately closed more than 500 points lower on Wednesday.

zh.title: 美联储暗示2026年可能加息，股指期货上升；韩国综合指数首次突破9000点：实时更新
zh.summary: 尽管早盘涨幅强劲，美国主要股指大幅下跌，道琼斯指数收盘下跌500多点。跌幅出现在美联储就2026年潜在加息调整进行沟通以及全球市场变动（包括韩国综合指数创历史新高）之际。

title: Oil falls as International Energy Agency forecasts supply glut next year after U.S.-Iran deal
summary: Oil prices are declining on expectations of increased supply following a U.S.-Iran agreement that improves regional stability. The International Energy Agency forecasts a supply surplus in the coming year, pressuring crude prices lower.
content: Oil declines as Mideast peace prospects rise following U.S.-Iran deal.

zh.title: 油价下跌，国际能源机构预测美伊协议后明年供应过剩
zh.summary: 在美伊协议改善地区稳定后，预期供应增加推动油价下跌。国际能源机构预测未来一年供应过剩，对原油价格施加下行压力。

title: China to return as major oil buyer in August, JPMorgan says, naming its top stock picks
summary: JPMorgan forecasts that China, the world's largest oil importer, will resume major oil purchases in August after a period of reduced imports. This return to buying could significantly impact global energy markets and influence oil price movements.
content: The pullback in oil imports by the world's largest oil importer has helped absorb the global energy shock and cap the surge in oil prices since the war began.

zh.title: 摩根大通表示中国将在8月恢复成为主要石油买家，并公布其最佳股票选择
zh.summary: 摩根大通预测，全球最大石油进口国中国将在经历进口减少期后，于8月份恢复进行大宗石油采购。这种购买回归可能会显著影响全球能源市场并推动油价走势。

title: Why has Texas set its sights on London?
summary: Texas is expanding its international presence by establishing a new trade office in London, reviving historical connections dating back to when the state maintained its own embassy. The move signals Texas's growing focus on independent trade and economic relationships.
content: Texas, which once had an embassy in London, strengthens its ties with the capital by opening a new trade office.

zh.title: 德州为什么把目光投向伦敦？
zh.summary: 德州通过在伦敦建立新的贸易办公室来扩展其国际存在，复兴了可以追溯到该州维持自己使馆时期的历史联系。此举表明德州越来越关注独立贸易和经济关系。

title: Why Wall Street banks and foreign borrowers are rushing to tap China’s cheap money
summary: Financial institutions and foreign entities are increasingly accessing China's panda bond market, drawn by competitive pricing and favorable lending terms. The trend reflects a significant capital flow toward China's financial markets from global borrowers.
content: Foreign governments, Wall Street banks and multinational companies are flocking to China's panda bond market.

zh.title: 为什么华尔街银行和海外借款人争相利用中国的廉价资金
zh.summary: 金融机构和海外实体越来越多地进入中国的熊猫债券市场，被具有竞争力的定价和有利的借贷条款所吸引。这一趋势反映了全球借款人向中国金融市场的重要资本流动。

title: Treasury 2-year yield post-Fed spike 'exaggerated' or is there room for more? Strategists weigh in
summary: Treasury yields jumped following Kevin Warsh's initial Federal Reserve meeting, sparking debate over whether the increase reflects temporary volatility or signals a fundamental policy shift. Market strategists remain divided on the sustainability and implications of the yield movement.
content: Markets pushed up short-term Treasury yields after Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting, though strategists disagreed on whether the move signals a lasting shift toward tighter policy.

zh.title: 美国国债2年期收益率在美联储决议后的上升"过度"还是仍有上升空间？策略师们权衡
zh.summary: 凯文·沃什首次美联储会议后，美国国债收益率飙升，引发了关于涨幅是反映短期波动还是信号基本政策转变的争议。市场策略师对收益率变动的可持续性和影响意见分歧。

title: Google Gemini co-lead Noam Shazeer leaves for OpenAI
summary: Noam Shazeer, a key figure in Google's Gemini AI development and vice president of engineering, is departing the company to join competitor OpenAI. The executive departure represents a significant shift in AI talent between the two major tech firms.
content: Google's vice president of engineering and a co-leader of its Gemini AI models announced Wednesday he is leaving the company to join OpenAI.

zh.title: 谷歌Gemini联合领导人诺姆·沙齐尔离职加入OpenAI
zh.summary: 诺姆·沙齐尔是谷歌Gemini人工智能开发的关键人物和工程副总裁，正在离职加入竞争对手OpenAI。这位高管的离职代表了两家主要科技公司之间人工智能人才的重大转变。

title: India’s largest stock exchange files for IPO as mega-listings gather pace
summary: India's largest stock exchange has filed for an initial public offering, joining a wave of major companies planning mega-listings in the country. The move reflects growing confidence in India's capital markets and investor appetite for large corporate debuts.
content: India's largest stock exchange sets the ball rolling for mega IPOs this year as it files papers to go public.

zh.title: 印度最大股票交易所申报IPO，大型上市加速推进
zh.summary: 印度最大股票交易所已提交首次公开发行申请，加入了一波公司在该国计划大型上市的浪潮。此举反映了市场对印度资本市场的信心不断增长，以及投资者对大型企业上市的兴趣。

title: Scared to spend your retirement money? Here’s one way to get over the fear of running out.
summary: This article addresses the psychological barriers to spending retirement savings, highlighting how fear of depletion can undermine financial well-being. The piece offers strategies to help retirees overcome this anxiety and make confident spending decisions.
content: This fear is probably going to cause you some regrets.

zh.title: 害怕花费退休储蓄？这是克服资金耗尽恐惧的一种方法
zh.summary: 本文讨论了花费退休储蓄的心理障碍，强调了对资金耗尽的恐惧如何会削弱财务福祉。文章提供了帮助退休人员克服这种焦虑并做出自信支出决策的策略。

title: I inherited a $500,000 IRA. Can I reduce the tax burden by using it for my children’s education?
summary: A person who inherited a $500,000 IRA seeks to minimize tax impact by redirecting funds toward their three children's college education. The article explores strategies for optimizing inherited retirement account distributions.
content: “I would like to use my share to help fund college for my three children.”

zh.title: 我继承了50万美元的个人退休账户。我能否通过将其用于孩子的教育来减少税负？
zh.summary: 一个继承了50万美元个人退休账户的人寻求通过将资金转向三个孩子的大学教育来最小化税收影响。该文章探讨了优化已继承退休账户分配的策略。

title: Inside India newsletter: Anthropic curbs ignite AI debate in India — efforts 'too slow, way too small'
summary: Anthropic's operational constraints are sparking debate in India about the country's AI development ambitions. Critics argue that India's reliance on foreign foundational models requires faster, more substantial local innovation efforts.
content: India's ambitions of becoming a global AI innovation powerhouse by building applications on top of foreign foundational models are being challenged.

zh.title: 印度内部通讯：Anthropic的限制措施引发印度AI辩论——努力"速度太慢，规模太小"
zh.summary: Anthropic的运营限制在印度引发了关于该国AI发展雄心的辩论。批评人士辩称，印度对外国基础模型的依赖需要更快、更实质性的本地创新努力。

title: Rumble gets 22,000 Nvidia chips, but the video company’s CEO insists this isn’t a fad-like pivot
summary: Rumble acquired 22,000 Nvidia chips for AI expansion, with its CEO defending the move as a strategic pivot rather than a passing trend. The decision reflects the company's serious commitment to artificial intelligence infrastructure.
content: Is Rumble’s AI expansion just Allbirds 2.0 — or a move modeled after Elon Musk?

zh.title: Rumble获得22,000块Nvidia芯片，但该视频公司CEO坚称这不是风尚般的转向
zh.summary: Rumble为AI扩展收购了22,000块Nvidia芯片，其CEO为这一举措辩护，称其为战略转向而非昙花一现的趋势。该决定反映了公司对人工智能基础设施的坚定承诺。
